description: Calculate the estimated volume of the bright circular/elliptical mass in the center of the loaded CT scan. Measure three distinct orthogonal dimensions (Length, Width, Height) in millimeters, ensuring each measurement is greater than 5.0 mm. Calculate the estimated volume using the standard medical ellipsoid formula: Volume = Length * Width * Height * 0.52. Save a screenshot showing the measurement lines to '~/DICOM/exports/volume_measurements.png' and create a JSON report at '~/DICOM/exports/volume_report.json' with the exact keys: 'axis_1_mm', 'axis_2_mm', 'axis_3_mm', and 'volume_mm3' containing the numerical float values.
